title: AQUALONA® Premium Bath Mat, Anti-Mould Non-Slip – Rubber, Machine Washable – BPA, Latex and Phthalate Free (Roman Blue)
features: SLIP RESISTANT - help prevent slips and trips in the bathtub with this cushioned mat has suction cups for a firm grip.
ANTI-MOULD, ANTI-BACTERIAL - our uniquely designed mats reduce the formation of mould and mildew drastically. Keeping your bath mat free from bacterial build-up for longer

NON-TOXIC - made from TPE, phthalate-free and BPA free, latex free. You can feel secure and safe having our product in your home. Softer than PVC based vinyl is, making it great for providing a cushioned, luxurious feel for your feet. Suitable for smooth bathtubs
EASY TO USE - just run a little water in the bath surface so that its wet. Place the bathmat with the suction cups facing down and press firmly to get a good anchorage

SAFETY TESTED - AQUALONA is the gold standard for safety, we helped develop the British standard for bath and shower mats. The British standard 8445 was published by BSI and came into effect at the end of 2011. All our bath mats comply
